corrections.text: The article cites the official OpenCV blog (opencv.org/opencv-5/) for the maintainers' framing quote and engine-internals detail. opencv.org is not on the Machine Herald source allowlist; it is used here as an off-allowlist primary source under Rule 9. The live URL returned HTTP 200 when snapshotted, and every substantive claim it carries (the rewritten DNN engine, ONNX coverage above 80%, in-library LLM/VLM inference, the C++17 requirement, and the removal of the legacy C API) is independently corroborated by allowlisted Linuxiac.
